case_title: SARMIENTO, JORGE et al VS FERNANDEZ, DOMITILIA O.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY SARMIENTO, JORGE AMADOR, IVY AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, DOMITILIA O. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, DOMITILIA O.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, DOMITILIA O.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-25-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-25-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR DEFT TO OBTAIN SERVICES OF AN INTERPRETER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SARMIENTO, JORGE AMADOR, IVY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, DOMITILIA O. $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,222.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
